title: U.S. will let Russian oil tanker reach Cuba, breaking Trump’s effective fuel blockade
summary_full: The Trump administration had threatened to punish countries who attempted to break his effective fuel blockade, aimed at weakening the communist government.
summary_public: The Trump administration had threatened to punish countries who attempted to break his effective fuel blockade, aimed at weakening the communist government.
